title: Refreshing Soundtracks!
description: Changes the Soundtracks of main menu and in-game by newer ones so you don't get bored of the repetitive ones or get reminded by Nostalgia every 5 minutes!
body:
# Refreshing Soundtracks!

**Refreshing Soundtracks** is a **Resource pack** that changes the old/new music with something more **ambient**.

This was meant to be a Private project but became a public one as the uploads were slow lately.

### Notices
- These **aren't** ~~Lo-Fi~~ as there's already too much of them.
- **None** of these musics are owned by me, they go to their **Respectful authors**. (There's a .txt file inside the .zip)
- Some C418 musics are still playing such as "mutation" as they're coded directly into the game - - Unable to change it (and other musics aswell)
- Version tested on **1.20.1** but works to **1.21**

## Spotify playlist!
For those that wanna take a listen to it you can go here and see it!
> [https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6QAKa6E2BgiFgVF7BcgfVx?si=c1cdc7a5d4d647af](https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6QAKa6E2BgiFgVF7BcgfVx?si=c1cdc7a5d4d647af)
